seniorBackendEngineer.title: Senior Backend Engineer
seniorBackendEngineer.description: Join the Core Platform team to build the backbone of noon's marketplace. You'll work on high-scale distributed systems serving millions of customers across the GCC.

productManagerFood.title: Product Manager - Food
productManagerFood.description: Lead the consumer-facing product for Noon Food. Define the roadmap, work closely with engineering and design, and drive key metrics for our food delivery platform.

frontendEngineer.title: Frontend Engineer
frontendEngineer.description: Build world-class shopping experiences for Namshi, noon's fashion vertical. Work on a React-based storefront serving millions of fashion enthusiasts.

dataScientist.title: Data Scientist
dataScientist.description: Build ML models that power noon's personalization engine. Join Everyday Labs - noon's AI and ML innovation hub - to work on cutting-edge recommender systems.

logisticsOperationsManager.title: Logistics Operations Manager
logisticsOperationsManager.description: Lead last-mile delivery operations across KSA and UAE. Drive efficiency, quality, and cost optimization for noon's delivery network of 5,000+ drivers.

uxDesigner.title: UX Designer
uxDesigner.description: Design seamless shopping experiences for Supermall, noon's premium marketplace. Own end-to-end design from discovery to delivery.

mobileEngineerIos.title: Mobile Engineer (iOS)
mobileEngineerIos.description: Build the fastest grocery delivery app in the region. Own high-performance native iOS features and release quality.
